title: Hikari Haven Cobblemon
description: Immerse yourself in a Pokémon anime-inspired adventure with this Cobblemon modpack! Explore a vibrant world filled with Pokémon and rich environments that capture the essence of the beloved series.
body:
# This modpack was created for the use of the Hikari Haven Server! 
This modpack contains client sided mods ideal in my opinion for Cobblemon as well as other mods
Some mods include of 
- [FightorFlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fight-or-flight-reborn)
- [Cobble Contests](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobble-contests)
- [Cobblemon Capture XP](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-capture-xp)
- [UI Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-ui-tweaks)
- [CobblemonExtras](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonextras)
- And More!

The modpack was created in mind for a geniune pokemon anime-like experience! To search, explore, and catch pokemon is the name of the game! Come across powerful species with your friends by your side!
